questionHtml:
What are all the possible phenotypes of children born to a mother with blood group AB and a father with blood group A?

A. AB only

B. A and B

C. AB, A and B

D. AB, A and O

meta.title: What are all the possible phenotypes of children born to a mother with blood group AB and a father with blood group A? A. AB only B. A and B C. AB, A and B D. AB, A and O
breadcrumbLabels: D3.2.9. ABO blood groups as an example of multiple alleles
